results.chunk_text:
[user]: Checkpoint this session: iTerm hangs, .agents cleanup, scanner fix.
[assistant]: Session 2026-07-11 outcomes: (1) iTerm2 beachball hangs root-caused to UI thread blocking on synchronous ShellHistory.sqlite WAL writes (guarded_pwrite_np); moved 1.1G ~/iterm2/Session-History (107 archives) to /Volumes/bakUp via rsync-verify-rm. Pending: disable Unlimited Scrollback + restart iTerm. (2) Removed ~/.agents/plugins — a broken partial mirror of ~/.claude/plugins where CLAUDE.md<->AGENTS.md alias symlinks were copied without targets, causing doc-source-enriched.py 'Skipping missing path' warnings. Swept all AI-config roots: 4 remaining symlinks, all healthy. (3) Hardened /Users/steven/pythons/scan-to-csv/doc-source-enriched.py: broken-symlink branch now prints target via os.path.islink+os.readlink, distinct from missing-path; verified via context7 CPython docs, live test, and CodeRabbit (0 findings). CodeRabbit CLI auth confirmed (AvaTar-ArTs). Memory files updated: reference-coderabbit-setup, mac-slowness-diagnosis, project-agents-cleanup-2026-07-11.
results.conversation_title: iTerm hang fix, .agents symlink cleanup, scanner hardening (2026-07-11)

results.chunk_text: [user]: assistant: Engram configured via REMOTE MCP server at user scope (~/.claude.json, mcp.getengram.app) - connected, tools load next session. Fixed dead env var ENGRAM_API -> ENGRAM_API_KEY in ~/.env.d/engram.env. Local auto-capture daemon DISABLED: Homebrew engram 0.3.4 ships no better-sqlite3 native binding and node v26.5.0 (ABI 147) has no prebuilt, so it crash-loops. Wrote ~/.claude/rules/engram.md with conventions: one conversation per work-session/topic; tags [project, type] where type in decision|bug|architecture|preference|setup; no-secrets-verbatim guardrail. CodeRabbit: CLI (brew cask coderabbit 0.6.5) + Claude Code plugin (coderabbit@claude-plugins-official v1.1.1) installed; repo-scoped; pending user browser auth and GitHub App for AvaTar-ArTs.
